display.purpose: Hero H1 only; the single largest voice.

label.purpose: Uppercase category tags on product cards.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, paired with translateY(-2..-6px) and a brighter mint border.

shadows.name: header-scroll
shadows.purpose: The tight lift the sticky header gains once the page scrolls.

shadows.name: mint-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft accent glow beneath the primary button.

motion.name: ease-house
motion.purpose: House ease-out curve for header, carousels, and larger transitions.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Hover/state feedback on buttons, links, cards.

motion.name: duration-settle
motion.purpose: Header scroll-state and other deliberate settles.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The booking CTA — mint gradient with dark ink, soft mint glow, lifts on hover.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action — transparent with a mint hairline border.

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Product/Keune filter pill; fills toward mint with a glow when active.

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Retail/price card — tinted gradient surface, mint hairline, lifts on hover. No nested cards.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark translucent field with a mint focus ring (dark-surface variant, not the light booking calendar).

components.name: Sticky Header
components.description: Frosted sticky header shown in its scrolled state (lighter frost + lift). Links shift to mint on hover.
components.html:
Matrix Eco Salon
Бидний тухайҮйлчилгээЗураг

narrative.overview: Matrix is a glasshouse of green after dark: deep forest-black surfaces, a soft mint glow that stands in for moonlight, and warm gold that reads as lamplight through the leaves. The system is dark by conviction, not fashion — a calm, low-lit space where hair and skin work is presented like botany under glass. Prestige is carried by material honesty and craft, never by volume; the mint accent earns its impact by being rare against the dark.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, near-black green canvas with a single mint accent and a warm-gold spark
One typeface (Manrope) working across the whole weight range
Soft-cornered surfaces with faint mint borders and tinted gradients, not hard cards
Motion is restrained and eased-out; blur/glow used only where it earns its place
Bilingual reality: Mongolian Cyrillic content, legible at mobile sizes

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Moonlit Mint is the only accent that carries meaning. Lamplight Gold is a guest, not a co-host — if a screen needs two accents to feel alive, the layout is wrong, not the palette.

rules.name: The Light-Island Rule
rules.body: The booking calendar and its inputs are deliberately inverted — white card, dark ink — because a scheduling UI must read like a crisp form, not a mood. It is the one sanctioned light island in a dark site; keep the mint accent for its active states so it still belongs.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Family Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a second typeface. Hierarchy and personality come from Manrope's weight range. A serif or a second sans breaks the system.

rules.name: The Soft-Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows are always dark, large-radius, and low-opacity. If a shadow looks like a hard 2014-app drop shadow (small blur, high opacity), it is wrong — widen the blur and drop the alpha.

dos: Do keep Moonlit Mint (#64d39a) rare — one accent, small area, high impact.
Do build depth from tonal layering (Forest Black → Deep Fern → Fern Rise) plus faint mint hairlines and soft, wide, low-opacity shadows.
Do carry hierarchy with Manrope weights (300–700), never a second family.
Do ease every transition out (cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)) and pair every animation with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do keep body text on Frosted Sage / Eucalyptus Gray against the dark base — verify ≥4.5:1 before shipping any new text color.
Do protect the booking path: browse → decide → book → pay stays obvious on every page and width.
donts: Don't ship the generic templated salon — no stock hero, no interchangeable beauty-template carousel.
Don't go loud, flashy, or neon — no high-saturation fills, glossy gradients, or busy competing accents.
Don't let a second accent (Lamplight Gold) compete with the mint — it is a rare spark, never a co-lead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or decorative glassmorphism; backdrop blur is reserved for the functional sticky header.
Don't nest cards, and don't spread identical icon+heading+text card grids.
Don't stamp hard, small-blur drop shadows, or drop text below Eucalyptus Gray on the dark base.
